items.description: Engine synchronization data diagnostic event (temporary loss of ECM-required data sources)
Missing required data elements diagnostic event (record lacks required fields at time of capture)
Power data diagnostic event (power-up/power-available behavior not compliant)
Data transfer diagnostic event (transfer mechanism operation not confirmed)
Unidentified driving records diagnostic event (>30 minutes unidentified driving in 24 hours)
Engine synchronization compliance malfunction (loss of ECM-required data sources beyond threshold)
Positioning compliance malfunction (unable to acquire required valid position within limits)
Power compliance malfunction (ELD not powered as required over aggregated driving time)
Data recording compliance malfunction (cannot record/retain or retrieve required events)
Timing compliance malfunction (ELD time not within UTC tolerance)
Data transfer compliance malfunction (transfer mechanism not confirmed over required checks)
